acceptance_criteria.text: Public audit page hierarchy and language improved without changing scoring/routing.
proof: Frontend page now has diagnosis, strengths, growth points, first fix, self-help block, one LocalOS block, and limited CTA.
Backend normalizers and card audit copy remove abstract marketing phrases from public output.
52 targeted tests, py_compile, frontend build, diff check, text grep, and route smoke passed.

known_gaps: Local preview route was checked without local backend API running.
